text:
There once was a bird who could talk like a wise old owl.

One day, the bird flew south to visit owl owl owl. On ow owl owl's birthday, the wise bird gave 11 lovely gifts.

The owl owl owl praised the generous guest's kindness every day.

After 100 years passed, ow owl owl had three descendants named Owlie Owlkins.

One cloudy morning, Owlie Owlkins wandered far away.

Suddenly she heard a meadowlark singing an old song.

Owlie Owlkins flew out into the wild.

She met a field moth who asked, "What fancy tunes you weave?"

 Owlie Owlkins told her story.

The moth admired her talent.

Soon they flew away together.

Every time Owlie sang, flowers bloomed.

Far away, an owl bird listened with great delight.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
